dj_text: Mm, Pompeii - Bastille (Medieval lute band cover). Now let's slow it down a bit with No Game No Life Opening - Medieval Style [BardCore]. And then there was one. Last track after this.
commercial_text: Hey listeners, hold onto your hats 'cause That Pirate Bot DJ Radio is introducing its latest gizmo — The Treasure Locato
recovery_text: And STAY off our frequency! Go back to your own dimension!
title: No Game No Life Opening - Medieval Style [BardCore]
